name: feedmail
description: RSS-to-email microservice on Cloudflare Workers. Monitor feeds, manage subscribers, send newsletters.

scripts.deploy: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --config wrangler.prod.toml && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.prod.toml
scripts.deploy:admin: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --config wrangler.admin.prod.toml && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.admin.prod.toml
scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --config wrangler.prod.toml
scripts.db:reset:local: wrangler d1 execute feedmail --local --command "DELETE FROM subscribers; DELETE FROM verification_attempts; DELETE FROM sent_items; DELETE FROM subscriber_sends; DELETE FROM rate_limits; DELETE FROM site_config; DELETE FROM rate_limit_config; DELETE FROM feeds; DELETE FROM channels; DELETE FROM admin_sessions; DELETE FROM magic_link_tokens; DELETE FROM credentials; DELETE FROM passkey_credentials; DELETE FROM webauthn_challenges;"
